sections.paragraph:
masc. pl. i.q. רָמֹות.-

(1) high things, heights, figuratively, sublime, difficult things, Pro 24:7 hence pr.n. [Ramoth]-(a) of a town of Gilead, otherwise called רָמֹות, רָמַת מִצְהֶ Deu 4:43 Jos 20:8 1Ch 6:65.-(b) in the tribe of Issachar, 1Ch 6:58 perhaps רֶמֶת Jos 19:21 and יַרְמוּת Jos 21:29.

(2) some precious thing, according to the Hebrew interpreters, red coral, Job 28:18 Eze 27:16.
